description:
India Book (IB) IV,55 (ח60). Letter from Yeḥezqel b. Netanel ha-Levi, probably in Qalyūb, to his brother Ḥalfon b. Netanel ha-Levi, in Alexandria. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Sunday, 2 Shevaṭ (1451 Seleucid) = 24 December 1139 CE. Written nine days after Yeḥezqel's preceding letter (IV,59; PGPID 9111). 
He reports that he arrived safely, probably to Qalyub, and that he took care of the things mentioned in certificate IV,59 and also in the subsequent documents, such as his sale of khazz silk and a payment to Abū Yiṣḥaq. At the end of the letter he greets his son Abū l-Fakhr, who was staying with Ḥalfon in Alexandria. (Information from Goitein and Friedman, India Book IV.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
